<!-- PRESERVED PRIOR README START -->
# KO7Benchmark

This is the public Lean module tree imported by `../KO7Benchmark.lean`.

The tree contains the locked answer-evidence modules plus the public theory
lane used by `../KO7BenchmarkTheory.lean`. The answer-key root remains
separate and locked even when theory modules are present alongside it.

Use `../README.md` for build instructions and
`../../7.scoring/answer-key/answer_key.json` to see which theorem names
are cited by the public answer key.
<!-- PRESERVED PRIOR README END -->
